self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can improve whole-product truth quality by letting the canonical report inspect the historical runtime-slice execution family directly.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP Architecture case materializes legacy Runtime slice-execution compatibility inside the shared state resolver.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP opener, direct report focus on historical runtime-slice execution artifacts still threw unsupported-path errors.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Historical Runtime slice-execution inspection becomes explicit, bounded, and reportable without inventing new Runtime v0 advancement.

decision.rationale: The canonical truth anchor should resolve the historical runtime-slice execution family as read-only history.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
